description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in myphpPagetool 0.4.3 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the ptinclude parameter to (1) help1.php, (2) help2.php, (3) help3.php, (4) help4.php, (5) help5.php, (6) help6.php, (7) help7.php, (7) help8.php, (8) help9.php, or (10) index.php in doc/admin/.
